Welcome to RampUp

Free MCAT practice that plays like a game. Real questions across all four sections, every answer explained from scratch, and it adapts to the classes you've taken. No account, nothing leaves your phone.

4
MCAT sections
280+
Questions
Free
No account

What year are you in?

Just so we understand your stage. There's no wrong answer, and everyone starts somewhere.

Which courses have you taken, or are taking now?

Mark what you've done. This sets your starting difficulty per subject. Courses you haven't taken yet still show up as Preview questions so you can get ahead, starting gently. (All physics here is MCAT-style algebra-based, no calculus.) Not sure, or just starting out? Leave them all on Not yet and we'll ease you into everything.

CARS (Critical Analysis & Reasoning) needs no coursework, so it's always included.

How confident do you feel so far?

For each subject you've started, tell us where you're at. Subjects you haven't started begin in Preview mode at an easy level.

You haven't started any subjects yet, so we'll ease you into everything as Preview. Tap Next to continue.

Here's your plan

We'll rotate questions across every MCAT section. Here's where each subject starts.

Settings

Remember my progressSave your stats, streak, review pile, and bookmarks on this device only. Nothing leaves your browser.
Sound effectsLittle dings and fanfares for answers, streaks, and level-ups.
AppearanceMatch your device, or force light or dark.
RampUp ProUnlock all full-length simulations and the readiness dashboard.
Daily goalHow many questions you're aiming for each day.
Edit my courses & confidenceUpdate what you've taken as your coursework grows. Your stats and review pile are kept.
Keyboard shortcuts
1–4 or A–D answer  ·  I I don't know  ·  E explain  ·  S bookmark  ·  →/Enter next  ·  ← back
Reset everythingErase saved progress and start over from onboarding.
No account, no backend. Your progress stays on this device.
